name: Qazaq: Son of the Sun
short_description: Qazaq: Son of the Sun - a single-player first-person open-world game with puzzles set in Kazakhstan, where you are the last surviving Qazaq saved by the Sun God.
detailed_description:
Adventure through the Ancient Lands of Kazakhstan

As the last Qazaq, saved by the Sun God, you must restore light and warmth to your homeland by defeating the evil spirit Shaitan. Explore the open world of Kazakhstan in the twilight and ignite the totems of all the tribes. Shaitan himself will mock you, lead you astray, and summon dark spirits. The power of the Sun will help you find the path to your ancestors and stand against Shaitan.

Game Features:

  • Stylized open world.
  • Pleasant nighttime atmosphere.
  • Interactive storytelling about Qazaq tribes.
  • Minimal interface for maximum immersion.
  • Simple totem puzzles.
  • Immortal player, enemies only deal debuffs.

Note: This game is perfect for people with limited time for gaming, seeking a simple and relaxing gameplay experience, as well as for newcomers to gaming due to its accessibility.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Russian*, Japanese, Turkish, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil
*languages with full audio support
